creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 209568
svn .diff

Port:

 * update: from 2.4.0 to 2.5.0
 * delete: files/patch-Makefile.cmdline, then
 * add: MAKE_ARGS+= CC=${CC}

Testing:

 * portlint -C
 * port test
 * poudriere testport -j 130Camd64 -p default -i -o lang/duktape
 * poudriere testport -j 120Ramd64 -p default -i -o lang/duktape
 * poudriere testport -j 113Ramd64 -p default -i -o lang/duktape
